tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsGetConfig
tools.description: Returns the Cloud Source Repositories configuration of the project.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposCreate
tools.description: Creates a repo in the given project with the given name. If the named repository already exists, `CreateRepo` returns `ALREADY_EXISTS`.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposList
tools.description: Returns all repos belonging to a project. The sizes of the repos are not set by ListRepos. To get the size of a repo, use GetRepo.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposSync
tools.description: Synchronize a connected repo. The response contains SyncRepoMetadata in the metadata field.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsReposTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error.

tools.name: projects.sourcerepoProjectsUpdateConfig
tools.description: Updates the Cloud Source Repositories configuration of the project.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
